requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (Ethiopia, via ES IEC 60335-2-24 + Kigali)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（埃塞俄比亚，经ES IEC 60335-2-24 + 基加利）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（衣索比亞，經ES IEC 60335-2-24 + 基加利）

summary.en: Ethiopia does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down regulation (there is no Ethiopian equivalent of EU Regulation (EU) 2024/573 imposing HFC quotas and product-level prohibitions). Refrigerant safety for household refrigerators is addressed mainly through the Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24, whose Annex AA sets requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants — including maximum R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 class A3 lower flammability) charge limits, ventilation, and ignition-source controls. On the environmental side, Ethiopia is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment and operates an HFC/ozone phase-down through its National Ozone Unit / Ministry of environment authority, consistent with developing-country (Article 5) timelines — but this governs bulk HFC consumption, not an EU-style ban on specific finished appliances. R-600a units are well-positioned for Ethiopia: the main obligations are (1) verifying the R-600a charge against ES IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits, and (2) declaring the refrigerant type and charge weight (grams) in product documentation. The in-country importer should confirm whether refrigerant documentation is checked in CACEA import inspection.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚不实施欧盟式氟气体削减法规（不存在与欧盟法规（EU）2024/573等同、施加HFC配额及产品级禁令的规定）。家用电冰箱的制冷剂安全主要通过采纳IEC 60335-2-24的埃塞俄比亚标准处理，其附件AA规定了使用可燃制冷剂器具的要求——包括R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817 A3级低可燃性）的最大充注量限制、通风及点火源控制。在环境方面，埃塞为《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过其国家臭氧机构/环境主管部门按发展中国家（第5条）时间表执行HFC/臭氧削减——但此管控散装HFC消费量，而非欧盟式对特定成品器具的禁令。R-600a器具在埃塞具备良好条件：主要义务为（1）核实R-600a充注量是否符合ES IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，及（2）在产品文件中声明制冷剂类型及充注量（克）。在地进口商应确认CACEA进口检验是否核查制冷剂文件。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞不實施歐盟式氟氣體削減法規（不存在與歐盟法規（EU）2024/573等同、施加HFC配額及產品級禁令的規定）。家用電冰箱的製冷劑安全主要通過採納IEC 60335-2-24的衣索比亞標準處理，其附件AA規定了使用可燃製冷劑器具的要求——包括R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817 A3級低可燃性）的最大充注量限制、通風及點火源控制。在環境方面，衣索為《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過其國家臭氧機構/環境主管部門按發展中國家（第5條）時間表執行HFC/臭氧削減——但此管控散裝HFC消費量，而非歐盟式對特定成品器具的禁令。R-600a器具在衣索具備良好條件：主要義務為（1）核實R-600a充注量是否符合ES IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，及（2）在產品文件中聲明製冷劑類型及充注量（克）。在地進口商應確認CACEA進口檢驗是否核查製冷劑文件。

standards_or_laws: ES IEC 60335-2-24 (Ethiopian Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24) — Annex AA: requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source controls)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — Ethiopia HFC/ozone phase-down via National Ozone Unit / environment authority (Article 5 developing-country timeline)
No EU-style F-Gas Regulation equivalent in Ethiopia (no equivalent of Regulation (EU) 2024/573)

summary.en: China regulates refrigerant safety in household appliances primarily through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge-limit and safety provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, supported by GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China has not adopted an EU-style F-Gas phase-down for finished products; it operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because both China (GB 4706.13) and Ethiopia (ES IEC 60335-2-24) base flammable-refrigerant handling on the same IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, and both run their HFC phase-down under Kigali rather than an EU-style product ban, the refrigerant frameworks are well-aligned for R-600a refrigerators — the work is documentation and charge verification, not technology change.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 4706.13-2014管理家用器具制冷剂安全，该标准纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的可燃制冷剂（R-600a）充注量限制及安全规定，并由GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）支持。中国未对成品采用欧盟式氟气体削减；其依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。由于中国（GB 4706.13）与埃塞（ES IEC 60335-2-24）的可燃制冷剂处理均基于同一IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，且两者均依基加利执行HFC削减而非欧盟式产品禁令，故R-600a电冰箱的制冷剂框架高度对齐——工作在于文件及充注量核实，而非技术更改。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 4706.13-2014管理家用器具製冷劑安全，該標準納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的可燃製冷劑（R-600a）充注量限制及安全規定，並由GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）支持。中國未對成品採用歐盟式氟氣體削減；其依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。由於中國（GB 4706.13）與衣索（ES IEC 60335-2-24）的可燃製冷劑處理均基於同一IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，且兩者均依基加利執行HFC削減而非歐盟式產品禁令，故R-600a電冰箱的製冷劑框架高度對齊——工作在於文件及充注量核實，而非技術更改。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge-limit and safety provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237-2001 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: The refrigerant gap is minimal and chiefly documentary, since both China and Ethiopia anchor on IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA and run HFC phase-down under Kigali rather than an EU-style finished-product ban: (1) Charge verification — confirm the R-600a charge meets ES IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA maximum limits (a function of appliance configuration); a Chinese GB 4706.13 test report normally covers this since the standards share the IEC base, but verify the figure. (2) Documentation — product documents should clearly state refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and flammability safety precautions; this satisfies both the ES safety standard and importer/inspection expectations. (3) No F-Gas ban to clear — unlike the EU, Ethiopia imposes no Regulation 2024/573-style HFC product prohibition, so even legacy R-134a units are not subject to an EU-style finished-product ban (though R-600a remains preferable on GWP and is the market norm). (4) Bulk HFC import — any separate import of bulk HFC refrigerant (not relevant to sealed factory-charged refrigerators) would fall under Ethiopia's Kigali quota administration. Confirm with the importer whether refrigerant documentation is required in the CACEA inspection file.
gap.zh: 制冷剂差距极小且主要为文件性，因中国与埃塞均以IEC 60335-2-24附件AA为依据，并依基加利执行HFC削减而非欧盟式成品禁令：（1）充注量核实——确认R-600a充注量符合ES IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值（取决于器具配置）；中国GB 4706.13检测报告通常已涵盖，因标准共享IEC基础，但仍须核实数值。（2）文件——产品文件应明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃性安全注意事项；此满足ES安全标准及进口商/检验预期。（3）无氟气体禁令须清除——与欧盟不同，埃塞不施加法规2024/573式HFC产品禁令，故即使旧款R-134a器具也不受欧盟式成品禁令约束（尽管R-600a在GWP上更优且为市场常态）。（4）散装HFC进口——任何单独的散装HFC制冷剂进口（与工厂密封充注的电冰箱无关）将受埃塞基加利配额管理。请向进口商确认CACEA检验文件是否要求制冷剂文件。
gap.zht: 製冷劑差距極小且主要為文件性，因中國與衣索均以IEC 60335-2-24附件AA為依據，並依基加利執行HFC削減而非歐盟式成品禁令：（1）充注量核實——確認R-600a充注量符合ES IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值（取決於器具配置）；中國GB 4706.13檢測報告通常已涵蓋，因標準共享IEC基礎，但仍須核實數值。（2）文件——產品文件應明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及可燃性安全注意事項；此滿足ES安全標準及進口商/檢驗預期。（3）無氟氣體禁令須清除——與歐盟不同，衣索不施加法規2024/573式HFC產品禁令，故即使舊款R-134a器具也不受歐盟式成品禁令約束（儘管R-600a在GWP上更優且為市場常態）。（4）散裝HFC進口——任何單獨的散裝HFC製冷劑進口（與工廠密封充注的電冰箱無關）將受衣索基加利配額管理。請向進口商確認CACEA檢驗文件是否要求製冷劑文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via ES IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits/ventilation) within the safety conformity step; no EU-style F-Gas finished-product ban applies. Ethiopia HFC phase-down under Kigali governs bulk HFC, administered by the National Ozone Unit / environment authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali administered by MEE — separate from any EU-style F-Gas Regulation

source.publisher: IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (adopted by ESA as ES) / Montreal Protocol Kigali Amendment — informational; confirm refrigerant documentation needs with the in-country importer

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a refrigerators are well-positioned for Ethiopia: there is no EU-style F-Gas finished-product ban, and flammable-refrigerant safety rests on the ES adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, which the Chinese GB 4706.13 test data largely covers since both share the IEC base. The work is verifying the R-600a charge against Annex AA limits and documenting refrigerant type and charge weight. Ethiopia's HFC phase-down runs under the Kigali Amendment (bulk consumption), not a product ban. Confirm refrigerant documentation needs with the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a电冰箱在埃塞俄比亚具备良好条件：不存在欧盟式氟气体成品禁令，可燃制冷剂安全依据采纳IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的ES，而中国GB 4706.13检测数据因共享IEC基础已大体涵盖。工作在于核实R-600a充注量是否符合附件AA限值并记录制冷剂类型及充注量。埃塞的HFC削减依《基加利修正案》执行（散装消费量），而非产品禁令。请向在地进口商确认制冷剂文件需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a電冰箱在衣索比亞具備良好條件：不存在歐盟式氟氣體成品禁令，可燃製冷劑安全依據採納IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的ES，而中國GB 4706.13檢測數據因共享IEC基礎已大體涵蓋。工作在於核實R-600a充注量是否符合附件AA限值並記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。衣索的HFC削減依《基加利修正案》執行（散裝消費量），而非產品禁令。請向在地進口商確認製冷劑文件需求。
